languages.text: "Вы на удивление властны для обычного вассала. Не злоупотребляйте моей благосклонностью, сегодня я потерял достаточно людей".

traits.locale_text: драфт: Себериан советует нам, как его слуге также разделять его взгляды.

languages.text: "You are surprisingly imperious for a common vassal. Do not abuse my goodwill, I have lost enough people today."
languages.original_text: "Вы на удивление властны для обычного вассала. Не злоупотребляйте моей благосклонностью, сегодня я потерял достаточно людей".

traits.locale_text: "You are surprisingly imperious for a common vassal. Do not abuse my goodwill, I have lost enough people today."
"You are surprisingly imperious for a common vassal. Do not abuse my goodwill, I have lost enough people today."
"You are surprisingly imperious for a common vassal. Do not abuse my goodwill, I have lost enough people today."

languages.text: “你区区一个封臣，竟如此盛气凌人。别糟蹋我的好意，今天我已经折损太多人手了。”
languages.original_text: "You are surprisingly imperious for a common vassal. Do not abuse my goodwill, I have lost enough people today."

traits.locale_text: “你区区一个封臣，竟如此盛气凌人。别糟蹋我的好意，今天我已经折损太多人手了。”

languages.text: « Vous êtes étonnamment pète-sec pour {mf|un simple vassal|une simple vassale}. N'abusez pas de ma mansuétude, j'ai déjà perdu assez de sujets pour aujourd'hui. »
languages.original_text: "You are surprisingly imperious for a common vassal. Do not abuse my goodwill, I have lost enough people today."

traits.locale_text: « Vous êtes étonnamment pète-sec pour {mf|un simple vassal|une simple vassale}. N'abusez pas de ma mansuétude, j'ai déjà perdu assez de sujets pour aujourd'hui. »

languages.text: "Sıradan bir vasal için şaşırtıcı derecede buyurgan konuşuyorsun. İyi niyetimi suistimal etme, bugün yeterince kayıp verdim zaten."
languages.original_text: "You are surprisingly imperious for a common vassal. Do not abuse my goodwill, I have lost enough people today."

traits.locale_text: "Sıradan bir vasal için şaşırtıcı derecede buyurgan konuşuyorsun. İyi niyetimi suistimal etme, bugün yeterince kayıp verdim zaten."

languages.text: «Para ser un{mf||a} simple vasall{mf|o|a}, tiene carácter imperios{mf|o|a}. No abuse de mi buena voluntad. Hoy ya he perdido a demasiada gente buena».
languages.original_text: "You are surprisingly imperious for a common vassal. Do not abuse my goodwill, I have lost enough people today."

traits.locale_text: «Para ser un{mf||a} simple vasall{mf|o|a}, tiene carácter imperios{mf|o|a}. No abuse de mi buena voluntad. Hoy ya he perdido a demasiada gente buena».

languages.text: "Für {mf|einen gewöhnlichen Vasallen|eine gewöhnliche Vasallin} seid Ihr erstaunlich herrisch. Stellt meine Geduld nicht auf die Probe. Ich habe heute schon genug Leute verloren."
languages.original_text: "You are surprisingly imperious for a common vassal. Do not abuse my goodwill, I have lost enough people today."

traits.locale_text: "Für {mf|einen gewöhnlichen Vasallen|eine gewöhnliche Vasallin} seid Ihr erstaunlich herrisch. Stellt meine Geduld nicht auf die Probe. Ich habe heute schon genug Leute verloren."

languages.text: 「お前は、ただの臣下とは思えないほど傲慢だ。私の好意を悪用するな、今日はもう十分な人を失った。」
languages.original_text: "You are surprisingly imperious for a common vassal. Do not abuse my goodwill, I have lost enough people today."

traits.locale_text: 「お前は、ただの臣下とは思えないほど傲慢だ。私の好意を悪用するな、今日はもう十分な人を失った。」
